title: Senior Product Engineer (AI)
description:
Loyalty Juggernaut Inc. (LJI) is a global leader in
enterprise loyalty and engagement technology. Our cloud-
native platform enables enterprises to design, deploy, and
manage next-generation customer experiences by combining AI,
analytics, and scalable cloud architectures.

Our Impact:

- 400+ million members connected through our platform.
- Trusted by 100+ global brands/partners, driving loyalty and
  brand devotion worldwide.

Proud to be a Three-Time Champion for Best Technology
Innovation in Loyalty!!

Explore more about us at www.lji.io.

As part of our continued growth, we are expanding our AI
Engineering Team to build and scale AI-driven product
capabilities that power intelligent engagement across our
platform.

We are seeking highly skilled and motivated Senior Product
Engineers – AI to join our AI engineering group in
Hyderabad. These roles will focus on developing, deploying,
and optimizing machine learning and generative AI solutions
that integrate directly into our core product ecosystem.

The ideal candidates are problem-solvers with strong
technical depth in Python, data analysis, and machine
learning — complemented by excellent communication skills
and the ability to collaborate effectively across cross-
functional teams.

Key Responsibilities:

- Design, develop, and deploy AI-driven product features using
  ML, NLP, or GenAI technologies.
- Work closely with product managers, data scientists, and
  platform engineers to deliver scalable AI solutions.
- Build and maintain end-to-end ML pipelines — from data
  preparation and model training to deployment and
  monitoring.
- Analyze data and experiment with techniques to improve model
  accuracy, performance, and business impact.
- Integrate models into production microservices and APIs.
- Follow best practices in software development, version
  control, CI/CD, and testing.
- Document solutions, share knowledge, and contribute to
  technical reviews.
- Stay current with advancements in AI frameworks and modern
  engineering practices.

Core Requirements

- Problem-Solving: Strong analytical and problem-solving
  skills; ability to think through complex scenarios and
  propose effective solutions.
- Programming: Proficiency in Python with experience using
  data and ML libraries (NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn,
  TensorFlow, or PyTorch).
- Machine Learning: Hands-on experience in building,
  evaluating, and deploying ML models.
- Data Analysis: Strong data manipulation and insight
  extraction skills using Python and analytical tools.
- Communication: Exceptional written and verbal communication
  skills — must be able to document, present, and discuss
  technical topics clearly with both technical and non-
  technical stakeholders.

You would make a GREAT FIT if you have :

- Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Data
  Science, Statistics, or a related field.
- 3 to 5 years of experience.
- Problem-Solving: Strong analytical and problem-solving
  skills; ability to think through complex scenarios and
  propose effective solutions.
- Programming: Proficiency in Python with experience using
  data and ML libraries (NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn,
  TensorFlow, or PyTorch).
- Machine Learning: Hands-on experience in building,
  evaluating, and deploying ML models.
- Data Analysis: Strong data manipulation and insight
  extraction skills using Python and analytical tools.
- Communication: Exceptional written and verbal communication
  skills — must be able to document, present, and discuss
  technical topics clearly with both technical and non-
  technical stakeholders.

Key Attributes

- Ownership mindset with high accountability.
- Passion for AI innovation and continuous learning.
- Strong collaboration and teamwork orientation.
- Ability to balance technical depth with product-level
  thinking.

ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves hands-on building, deploying, and
optimizing ML and generative AI solutions directly into the
product ecosystem. Responsibilities include building end-to-
end ML pipelines, model training, deployment to
microservices, and integrating GenAI/ML technologies into
core product features.
